node.content-desc: 蒲飞路巴士总站(公交站)

node.text: <font size="32">蒲飞路巴士<font color='@Color_Text_Brand'>总站</font>(<font color='@Color_Text_Brand'>公交</font>站)</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> Pokfield Road Bus Terminus (Public Station)</font>
<font color='#5ABB9E'>2</font>条途径线路有实时公交信息

node.content-desc: 香港动植物公园,花园道(公交站)

node.text: <font size="32">香港动植物公园,花园道(<font color='@Color_Text_Brand'>公交</font>站)</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> Hong Kong Zoological & Botanical Garden, Garden Road (Bus Station)</font>
<font color='#5ABB9E'>4</font>条途径线路有实时公交信息

node.content-desc: 大潭郊野公园,大潭道(公交站)

node.text: <font size="32">大潭郊野公园,大潭道(<font color='@Color_Text_Brand'>公交</font>站)</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> Tai Tam Country Park, Tai Tam Road (Bus Station)</font>
<font size="32">香港动植物公园</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> Hong Kong Zoological and Botanical Gardens</font>
中西区本地人推荐的景点榜第6名
可以带小孩去玩，很舒服的地方
<font size="32">大桥路,大桥村(<font color='@Color_Text_Brand'>公交</font>站)</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> Tai Kiu Road, Tai Kiu Tsuen (Bus Station)</font>
<font color='#5ABB9E'>1</font>条途径线路有实时公交信息
<font size="32">香港动植物公园(北1门)</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> Hong Kong Zoological and Botanical Gardens (North Gate 1)</font>
雅宾利道与上亚厘毕道交叉口东南60米
<font size="32">油尖旺宠物公园</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> Yau Tsim Mong Pet Garden</font>
渡船街与欣翔道交叉口东南40米

node.content-desc: 搜索框，310路(潭桥公交总站--动物园)
